faqs.question: What types of medical equipment do you sell?
faqs.answer: Lofty Mediquip offers a wide range of medical equipment including ECG machines, hospital beds, anesthesia machines, nebulisers, diagnostic devices, monitoring equipment, and accessories from leading brands.

faqs.question: How can I place an order?
faqs.answer: You can place an order directly through our website by adding items to your cart, or by using the 'Inquiry Now' button on the product page to get in touch with our sales team for bulk orders.

faqs.question: What is your shipping policy?
faqs.answer: Orders are initiated and processed for shipment upon receipt of request from the customer. Shipping fees and timelines depend on the product size, weight, and delivery location. We follow the seller's terms of shipment.

faqs.question: Do you offer EMI options?
faqs.answer: Yes, EMI options are available on select products. Please contact our sales team to know more about financing options available for your purchase.

faqs.question: Are all products authentic?
faqs.answer: Yes, 100% of our products are authentic and sourced directly from certified manufacturers or authorized distributors. Each product undergoes quality checks before dispatch.

faqs.question: What is your return policy?
faqs.answer: We follow a structured return policy. Products can be returned within 7 days of delivery if found defective or not matching the description. Please contact our support team to initiate a return request.

faqs.question: Do you provide after-sales service?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide after-sales support and can connect you with authorized service centers for the brands we carry. Contact our customer care team for service assistance.

faqs.question: Can I track my order?
faqs.answer: Yes, once your order is dispatched, you will receive a tracking number via email or SMS. You can use this to track your shipment on the courier's website.

careers.title: Sales Executive - Medical Equipment
careers.description: We are looking for an experienced Sales Executive to join our growing team. You will be responsible for building client relationships, achieving sales targets, and representing Lofty Mediquip in the market.
requirements: 2-4 years of experience in medical equipment sales
Knowledge of hospital equipment and medical devices
Willingness to travel within the region

careers.title: Customer Support Specialist
careers.description: Join our customer support team to provide excellent service to healthcare professionals. You will handle inquiries, process orders, and ensure customer satisfaction.
requirements: Proficiency in MS Office and CRM tools

careers.title: Logistics & Warehouse Coordinator
careers.description: Manage the day-to-day logistics operations including inventory management, order processing, and coordinating with shipping partners.
